LOADING PYTHON RUNTIME…pyodide + numpy, ~12 MB on first visit — cached after that

drag to pan · scroll or pinch to zoom · double-click to zoom in / reset · the world resolves finer detail the deeper you go, coherent with the planet above. Thumbnails stay whole-planet.

Time & climate

0.35 d/s
0.65
0.180

1 day = 1 day/night cycle · year = 96 days · seasons flip per hemisphere.

Export sequence

Exports the current view layer at the current seed & settings as a zip of PNGs + meta.json. The simulation itself is worldgen.py + world_core.py running in your browser via Pyodide.
